strategy_description: Phase 1 tape analysis only (see analysis.json round4_phase1_complete). Script: manual_traders/R4/r3v_rolling_iv_zscore_06/r4_phase1_counterparty.py
Round 4 baseline no-op trader (Phase 1: counterparty IDs not yet wired into TradingState; Phase 2 will load precomputed signals). Round 4 days 1-3.
Round 4 Phase 2: precomputed Mark 67 aggressive-buy-on-EXTRACT triggers; lift VEV_5300 ask in window, flatten to bid when window ends (no Sonic gate).
Round 4 Phase 3: same Mark67 triggers as v23 but entries only when Sonic joint gate holds (VEV_5200 and VEV_5300 spreads both <= 2).
Post-Phase-3: Mark 22 passive seller on aggressive buys (precomputed merged triggers); long VELVETFRUIT_EXTRACT at ask in window with Sonic joint gate + spread cap; flatten when window off.

Mark 67 aggressive extract triggers **pre-filtered** to tape rows where 5200+5300 were jointly tight at the print (r4_v26_signals.json, 27/164); same execution as v24 (lift V5300 in window only if joint tight + spread cap).
Same as v26 (r4_v26_signals + joint-tight entry) but **flatten V5300 when joint gate breaks** during the window, not only when the window ends (Sonic regime-exit hypothesis).
v26 logic but post-trigger window **25_000** (half v26) per tape joint-gate persistence study (median first non-tight offset ~100 ticks).
v26 with **Q=4** lift clip (vs 6); same 50k window and r4_v26_signals.
v26 + require **VELVETFRUIT_EXTRACT** spread <=2 at **execution** time (not only at Mark67 print).
v26 with **MAX_SPREAD_V=4** for V5300 (vs 6); same triggers and window.
v26 with **MAX_Q=18** on V5300 during windows (tape: up to 3 overlapping v26 windows); stop lifting beyond 18 until flat off-window.
v26 with **MAX_Q=36** on V5300 during windows (6 clips; aligns with max 3 overlapping windows x 2 clips each rough bound).
v26 with **MAX_Q=24** on V5300 during windows (4 clips of 6).
INTENDED: skip lifts when merged ts>=2e6; **BUG**: backtester uses **local** timestamps so guard is a no-op — identical to v26. See v36 + analysis iteration 15.
v26 execution but **r4_v36_signals.json**: drop 15 Mark67 triggers on merged tape day 3 (T>=2e6); 12 triggers remain. Fixes v35 timestamp confusion by offline filter.

**Post-fix** (2026-04-26): merged trigger windows use `day_cum_offset[state.day_num]+timestamp` (see merged_ts_util + TradingState.day_num). Supersedes prior v26 backtests that bisected on local ts only.
Fixed v26 + **EOD flatten** on tape days 1–2 when local ts>=994_900 (PAD=5000 before day end); no EOD rule on day 3.
Fixed v26 + EOD flatten days 1-2 with **EOD_PAD=500** (vs v37 PAD=5000); last 500 local ts before 999_900.
Fixed v26 + **EOD flatten tape day 2 only** (local ts>=999_400, PAD=500); no day-1 EOD.
**Post merged-ts fix** rerun: Mark67 full-list r4_v23_signals, lift V5300 in window (same as iteration 3 logic but correct cross-day windows).
**Post merged-ts fix** rerun: v23 + Sonic joint gate at execution.
**Post merged-ts fix** rerun: v26 + flatten when joint gate breaks mid-window.
v38 line: EOD flatten days 1–2, **EOD_PAD=200** (finer bracket vs 500).
v38 line: **EOD_PAD=750** — best in EOD grid (day_1 551, total 3279).
v38 line: **EOD_PAD=1000** — over-flatten: day_1 490, total 3218 (worse than 750).
v46 baseline (**EOD_PAD=800**) with **Q=5** lift clip — **best total +3,470** R4 days 1-3.
v46 + **MAX_SPREAD_V=4** — **+3,284** (same as v46; cap no-op in-window).
**Q=5** + EOD_PAD **780** — **+3,470** (identical to v50; EOD irrelevant once clip limits inventory).
